merchant.description: Complete details of the merchant/vendor/seller issuing the invoice. This is the company or public authority providing goods/services and requesting payment (the issuer of the document), not the customer being billed.

name.description: Legal or trading name of the merchant/vendor/seller company issuing the invoice. Typically near the logo, in the header, or labeled as 'From', 'Vendor', 'Seller', 'Service Provider' or 'Company Name'. Use the organisation name (e.g., 'Bristol BID', 'Blue Direct Limited'), not an individual contact person. Do not include address lines, postcodes, or labels.

business_unit.description: Merchant internal unit/division/branch/department operating the sale or rental (e.g., 'Vermietstation LZNW Langzeit Plus', 'London Branch'). Accept labels such as 'Business Unit', 'Dept.', 'Station', 'Branch', 'Filiale', 'Division'. If not explicit, use a clearly labeled sub-entity tied to the transaction (e.g., rental station code). Leave blank if no BU-like label is present.

tax_reg_number.description: Merchant’s tax registration number (e.g., VAT ID, USt-IdNr., TVA, IVA, GST). Detect labels: 'VAT', 'VAT No', 'VAT Reg No', 'USt-ID', 'Umsatzsteuer-ID', 'TVA', 'IVA', 'GST', 'Tax Reg No', 'Tax ID'. For the UK, map 'VAT Reg No' to this field. Preserve country prefixes and formatting without inserting spaces. Do NOT use SEPA Creditor IDs, company registration numbers, or local tax numbers that are clearly separate from VAT unless they are explicitly labeled as VAT.

tax_payer_id.description: Merchant’s non-VAT taxpayer or registration identification when explicitly present (e.g., TIN, Steuernummer, EIN, company registration number). Detect labels such as 'TIN', 'Steuernummer', 'Taxpayer ID', 'Tax No', 'Company No', 'Registered in England and Wales No'. If only a VAT ID exists and no separate taxpayer/registration ID is labeled, leave this blank.

bank_account_number.description: Domestic bank account number (non-IBAN) of the merchant, when printed, e.g., 'Konto-Nr.', 'Account No', 'Sort Code / Account'. If only an IBAN is present, extract a domestic account number only if it is explicitly printed; otherwise leave blank. Do not copy IBAN values into this field unless a separate domestic account number is clearly shown.

iban_number.description: Merchant IBAN(s) for payment. Normalize by removing all spaces and newlines. If multiple valid IBANs appear, return ALL in the order they appear, separated by a semicolon (e.g., 'DE34200300000016177461;DE39200700000084150200'). Do NOT return SEPA Creditor IDs, BICs, sort codes, or bank names here.

address_line_1.description: First address line of the merchant/vendor issuing the invoice (e.g., building + street or PO Box). Do not include city, country or postcode here. Example: 'Unit 9, Thames Industrial Estate' or 'Revenues (CH), PO Box 3399'.

city.description: City or town where the merchant/vendor company is located (e.g., 'Bristol', 'Dunstable', 'London'). Do not include country or postcode.

country.description: Country where the merchant/vendor company is registered or operating from (e.g., 'United Kingdom', 'Germany'). Use the country name as printed; do not infer if unclear.

post_code.description: Postal/ZIP code of the merchant/vendor company's address (e.g., UK style 'BS1 9NE', 'LU6 3HL').

email.description: Email address of the merchant/vendor company for business correspondence or billing enquiries, taken from the merchant block (e.g., 'bidsbilling@bristol.gov.uk'). Do not use customer or contact-person emails.

bill_to.description: Complete details of the customer/client/buyer being billed. This is the entity that receives the invoice/credit note and is responsible for payment, distinct from the merchant/issuer.

name.description: Organization name of the customer/client/buyer who is being billed. Typically in sections labeled 'Bill To', 'Invoice To', 'Customer', 'Client', 'Buyer' or near text such as 'This bill relates to', 'What you have to pay'. Use the organisation name (e.g., 'EXPERIS LIMITED', 'Brook Street'), not the property description or an individual contact person. When 'c/o' is present, use the entity before 'c/o' as the name. And should not include the person name.

business_unit.description: Business unit or department of the customer company being billed when explicitly labeled (e.g., 'Finance Dept', 'Accounts Payable', 'Shared Services Centre'). Leave blank if no BU/department-like label is present.

tax_reg_number.description: Tax registration number of the customer/client being billed (e.g., buyer's VAT number) when explicitly shown in the bill-to block. Do not copy the merchant VAT number here. Leave blank if the buyer’s tax number is not printed.

tax_payer_id.description: Taxpayer or registration identification of the customer/client being billed (e.g., TIN, Tax No, Company No) when explicitly shown in the bill-to block. Leave blank if not present.

address_line_1.description: First address line of the customer/client being billed (e.g., building + street). For c/o patterns, keep the 'c/o ...' text and street together in this line if on the same line or following line. Do not include city, country or postcode.

city.description: City or town of the customer/client being billed.

country.description: Country of the customer/client being billed. Use the printed value if available; do not infer if missing.

post_code.description: Postal/ZIP code of the customer/client billing address (e.g., 'W1W 6UF', 'AL1 4JB').

email.description: Email address of the customer/client for invoice correspondence, taken from the bill-to/customer block if explicitly printed. If no customer email appears, set this to null.

invoice_id.description: Unique invoice number or identifier, typically labeled as 'Invoice #:', 'Invoice No:', 'Bill No:', or 'Reference No:'

invoice_date.description: Date when the invoice was issued in YYYY-MM-DD format, usually labeled as 'Invoice Date:', 'Issue Date:', or 'Bill Date:'. Always convert the date into YYYY-MM-DD format.

invoice_period_start.description: The date when the billing or service period begins in YYYY-MM-DD format. Always convert the date into YYYY-MM-DD format.

invoice_period_end.description: The date when the billing or service period ends in YYYY-MM-DD format. Always convert the date into YYYY-MM-DD format.

due_date.description: Payment due date in YYYY-MM-DD format, often labeled as 'Due Date:', 'Payment Due:', or 'Pay By:'.  Always convert the date into YYYY-MM-DD format.

total_amount.description: Final total amount to be paid including all taxes, fees, and charges. This is the bottom-line amount on the invoice

net_amount.description: Total net amount before taxes across all items and charges

tax_amount.description: Total tax amount across all items, usually shown in tax summary section

roundoff_amount.description: Rounding adjustment amount to arrive at the final total, may be positive or negative

gross_amount.description: Total gross amount including taxes but before any rounding adjustments

currency.description: Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP) or symbol used for all amounts on the invoice

payment_terms.description: Payment terms and conditions, such as 'Net 30', 'Due on Receipt', 'Payment within 15 days', etc.

invoice_category.description: Category of the invoice, e.g., Purchase Order or Non Purchase Order based on if the invoice references a Purchase Order indicating pre-approved procurement, otherwise it is a Non Purchase Order

invoice_type.description: Type of the invoice, e.g., Standard Invoice, Credit Note, Debit Note, or PrePayment. And ensure that we always return the invoice type in English.

purchase_order_number.description: Purchase order number if the invoice is a purchase order

cost_center_code.description: A unique alphanumeric identifier (e.g., "CC001", "DEPT-HR", "3001") that appears at invoice header level

invoice_language.description: Detect the language of the invoice text and respond with only the ISO 639-1 language code

translated_text.description: Do not perform translation and return blank string.

multi_invoice.description:
Check if the input file has more than one invoice attached to it.
If more than one invoice is present then flag it as 1 otherwise mark it as 0. When we have more than one invoice ids it becomes an indicator for multiple invoices. If not sure default should be 0.

items.description: List of all line items, products, services, or charges detailed in the invoice

description.description: Description of the item, product, or service being invoiced. This appears in the line items section of the invoice. And keep the description under 240 characters.

business_line.description: Business line, category, department, or product line that this item belongs to. May be labeled as 'Category:', 'Business Line:', 'Department:', or 'Product Type:'

quantity.description: Quantity or number of units of the item being billed

unit_price.description: Price per unit of the item before taxes and discounts

tax_rate.description: Tax or VAT rate percentage applicable for this specific item

tax_amount.description: Tax or VAT amount calculated for this specific item extract from the invoice if mentioned or perform the calculation (quantity * unit price * tax rate)

with_holding_tax_rate.description: Extract the percentage of tax deducted at source from payments, typically labeled as Withholding Tax, WHT, TDS, or Source Tax and expressed as a percentage

gross_amount.description: Total amount for this item including taxes, extract it if mentioned otherwise do the calculation (gross = quantity*net + tax)

net_amount.description: Net amount for this item before taxes, extract it if mentioned otherwise do the calculation (quantity × unit_price - discount)

discount.description: Discount amount, promotional savings, or voucher reduction applied to this item

cost_center_code.description: A unique alphanumeric identifier (e.g., "CC001", "DEPT-HR", "3001") that appears at line item level

description_country_language.description: Detect the language of the invoice text and respond with only the ISO 639-1 language code

tax_line_summaries.description: Summary breakdown of taxes by rate, typically found in a tax summary section showing different tax rates and their totals

tax_rate.description: Tax or VAT rate percentage for this tax summary line, typically found in tax breakdown section

tax_amount.description: Total tax or VAT amount for this rate category, found in tax summary or totals section

gross_amount.description: Total gross amount for this tax rate category (taxable amount + tax)

net_amount.description: Total net amount (taxable base) for this tax rate category before tax
